title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare
main_description: Oars becomes the central danger while the crew tries to bring down Thriller Bark. The chapter mainly follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Chopper, keeping the focus on the Thriller Bark storyline.
